TEXT: A student who swallowed Sukuna's finger and became a vessel for the King of Curses. NL He fights with martial arts and Divergent Fist.
NL You prepare your Divergent Fist for the final blow...

Navigating an unlit street, you come across several hooded figures in the midst of some dark ritual. As you approach, they turn to you in eerie unison. The tallest among them bares fanged teeth and extends a long, pale hand towards you. NL ~"Join~ ~us,~ ~vessel,~ ~and~ ~feel~ ~the~ ~warmth~ ~of~ ~the~ ~Spire."~
